name: Consent to the Processing of Personal Data — Main
body_ru:
I, the undersigned, in accordance with the requirements of Federal Law No. 152-FZ of July 27, 2006 "On Personal Data", hereby give my free, informed, specific and conscious consent to LLC "Absolut" (hereinafter — the Operator) to process the following categories of my personal data:

— Last name, first name, patronymic;
— Email address;
— Phone number.

Purpose of processing: identification when contacting support, sending information about the status of applications and contracts.

List of actions with personal data: collection, recording, systematization, accumulation, storage, clarification (updating, modification), retrieval, use, transfer (provision, access), depersonalization, blocking, deletion, destruction.

Validity period: 3 (three) years from the date of signing or until the consent is revoked.

Consent may be revoked by sending a written statement to: privacy@example.ru
